Class DynasticCalculator.DynasticPerson

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.natural.biology.DynasticCalculator.DynasticPerson
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DynasticCalculator
public static class DynasticCalculator.DynasticPerson extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a person within a dynastic lineage.
